name: codex-ios-swiftui-kit
description: Codex-native iOS SwiftUI UX/UI bundle for distinctive design, implementation, accessibility, performance, and review

interface.shortDescription: Design, build, and review premium iOS SwiftUI UI
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin bundle for iPhone-first SwiftUI design direction, implementation guidance, accessibility, performance, architecture, and expert review.
defaultPrompt: Design a premium iPhone SwiftUI screen with clear hierarchy and accessible spacing.
Implement this design in SwiftUI with modern navigation and adaptive layout.
Review my SwiftUI view for state, accessibility, and performance issues.
